reviews.text: Had our roof replaced and I wasn't disappointed is an understatement. From the first call to completion, I felt I was personally looked after. David, Morgan, Brendan and team were all absolute professionals at their work. They were prompt, polite, friendly and competent. Stunned by how fast and efficiently they work with our whole roof replaced in 3 days (including 1 rain day) and the whole job done in 5 working days. Felt safe at all times that the work was top class. These guys also had the best price by a significant amount. Would recommend to anyone!

We have had a wonderful experience with Queensland Roofing (we mostly dealt with Morgan who was fantastic to speak to and deal with), from first point of contact right through to completion of the job. They are very honest, reliable and professional and we will definitely be contacting them again when we need future maintenance or jobs done for our roof. Many thanks again. ^_^

Overall, the experience was excellent. Justin and David are very knowledgeable, professional, and responsive. Justin's assessment during the quoting process was very thorough. He answered all my questions, and proposed several solutions to the challenges we presented. After reviewing several companies that we got in to quote our roof, Queensland Roofing was our top pick because of the extra information they gave to us, it didn't feel like we were just another job to them. Not only did they do a terrific job of replacing our cracked tiles and installing new clips, they made every effort to clean-up all debris. I would highly recommend Justin and David from Queensland Roofing!

Many thanks to Morgan who repaired our leaking roof in January.  We had no rain to truly test the repair until the remains of Cyclone Debbie dumped over 300mm on us in 24 hours at the end of March.  Not a single drop of water came through our ceiling, so I consider that a job extremely well tested and very well done.  We appreciate the good work.

We recently had Queensland Roofing attend to our leaking roof following the heavy rain and storms earlier in the year. David initially did a thorough inspection of the roof and provided a detailed quote on works to be completed. Then together with his team, Greg and Allan, job was completed above and beyond our expectation. Their work ethic and professionalism  was very refreshing. I have since recommended Queensland Roofing to others in our street.

analysis.summary: Customers consistently praise the team's professionalism, speed, and thoroughness, with specific highlights on storm damage repairs and complete roof replacements. The reviews convey a strong sense of trust and personal care, with no negative feedback present in this sample.

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data, suggesting either a lack of engagement or that replies are not included in this specific export.
redesign_hooks: Feature the '3-day replacement' stat prominently in the services section to emphasize speed.
Use the Cyclone Debbie repair story in a case study or 'Storm Damage' landing page to build authority.
Highlight the 'personal care' aspect in the 'About Us' section to differentiate from larger, impersonal competitors.
